name_en: The Butterfly Buckle (Bow Shoulder Bag) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric and chestnut leather bring out a strong vintage vibe, offering a unique charm that differs from the all-leather version.
name_cn:
The Butterfly Buckle (Bow Shoulder Bag) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric and chestnut leather bring out a strong vintage vibe, offering a unique charm that differs from the all-leather version.
Model: 789039
Size: 40*48*20cm
